title: Uncraft Everything
description: Crafted wrong item? Uncraft everything with this mod!
body:
# ♻️ Uncraft Everything
*A powerful utility mod that lets players reverse the crafting process — and reclaim their resources.*

---

## 🧱 What This Mod Does

**Uncraft Everything** adds a **uncrafting mechanic** to Minecraft, allowing players to take crafted items and break them back down into their original components.

Whether you accidentally crafted the wrong item, need to recycle old tools (With full durability), or want to get value out of loot, this mod gives you an intuitive way to recover materials — all while maintaining balance.

### Features:
- ✅ Supports **vanilla and modded items**


### Configs:
- Experience Point for Uncrafting
- Prevent certain items from Uncrafting

Modify in `/config/uncrafteverything_common.toml`

---

## 💡 Why Download This?

In survival gameplay, every resource matters. With *Uncraft Everything*, you can:

- 🪓 Recover materials from unused or extra tools, armor, and blocks  
- 🏹 Undo accidental crafts and wasted resources  
- ♻️ Improve inventory management and reduce item clutter  
- 🧩 Build modpacks with more player agency and creativity

This mod is perfect for **tech-based**, **RPG**, **skyblock**, **hardcore**, or **builder-focused packs** — or just everyday Minecraft survival.

---

## 📥 Installation & Setup

**Mod Loaders:** Fabric and NeoForge are supported.

1. Download and install your preferred mod loader.  
2. Place `Uncraft Everything` in your `/mods` folder.  
3. Launch the game — you're ready to go!
4. 
---

## ⚙️ How It Works

**Base Functionality:**
- Place a crafted item into the **Uncrafting Table**.
  
---

## 🖥 Compatibility

- ✅ 100% vanilla compatible  
- ✅ Works with most modded items (standard crafting recipes)  
- ✅ Multiplayer and server-compatible  

---

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Contributions

Have a bug to report, feature request, or translation to contribute?  
Please open an issue or submit a PR on the [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/CoolerProYT/UncraftEverything/issues)

---

## 🚧 Important Notes

- ❌ **Enchanted items will not return enchanted book**.
- 🪓 **Damaged tools unable to uncraft**.
- 🔒 **Balance-focused:** The goal is utility, not duplication exploits.
- 🧩 Designed for survival, challenge, and tech gameplay — not cheat mode.

---
